name: inspectiq
description: AI-assisted vehicle inspection and condition report platform portfolio project.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @inspectiq/shared && npm run build -w @inspectiq/api && npm run build -w @inspectiq/web && npm run typecheck -w @inspectiq/mobile
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @inspectiq/shared && npm run dev -w @inspectiq/api
scripts.lint: npm run build -w @inspectiq/shared && npm run lint -w @inspectiq/api && npm run lint -w @inspectiq/web && npm run lint -w @inspectiq/mobile
scripts.test: npm run test:workflows && npm run build -w @inspectiq/shared && npm run test -w @inspectiq/api && npm run test -w @inspectiq/web && npm run test -w @inspectiq/mobile
scripts.test:mobile: npm run typecheck -w @inspectiq/mobile && npm run test -w @inspectiq/mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @inspectiq/shared && npm run typecheck -w @inspectiq/api && npm run typecheck -w @inspectiq/web && npm run typecheck -w @inspectiq/mobile
